data.name: Living with temptation: American sunset
data.detailed_description:
LIVING WITH TEMPTATION is a sensual relationship simulator in which you need to balance your love for Tracy, your wife and your desire for your nanny, Lisa. The game was initially released in 2013, and then in 2021, we prepared a remodeled version with new renders and more content. Now, over 10 years after the original release, we’re presenting to you its evolution, AMERICAN SUNSET.

This new project utilizes already-created assets mixed with a crazy amount of new content produced exclusively for this game version. Everything is produced in a new game engine with heavenly improved mechanics, minimizing grind, getting rid of all limitations, and making all interactions as enjoyable as possible.

So, help Tracy with the household chores, take care of your baby, earn money and spoil her with your kindness. Rediscover the pleasure of sex with your wife again, or… fall in love with your nanny… or any other girl you meet in our version of Los Angeles. Temptation awaits.

What kind of changes AMERICAN SUNSET brings?

- new scenes adding many more details and tension to the story we are all familiar with

- switch from a mundane stat builder into a quest base game with a friendly hint system

- massive gameplay overhaul and switch from a 24-hour system to 6 decisions per day

- completely redesigned daily interactions with girls, including new outfits and actions

- introduction of new characters, including Justin’s sexy new publisher, a gym coach and more

- all the locations we have in the game are animated, and most have day and night versions

- impressive new work system, making Justin’s writing tasks much more interesting

- updated and improved images and animations for the content from the original game

- everything coded in RENPY with dozens of save slots, options to roll back time and more

AMERICAN SUNSET is... LWT written absolutely from scratch, in a new engine, with new gameplay, scenes, characters and better visuals. It will include all the content we've produced for LWT to date, plus additions. Selected old scenes will be expanded, and new scenes will be added…

  • beautifully redesigned daily actions for all girls you know plus for Coco, Hannah, Sandy and more

  • quest for introducing Lisa into your house, ending with a night out with your hot wife

  • introduction to Dominique, your new publisher - write erotic books with a cool new interface

  • expanded scenes for Sandy, leading to a dedicated ending with her

  • highly extended Hannah scenes, with dedicated daily actions, hot webcam scenes and even ending

  • introduction of Amanda and Blake who will guide your first into swinger’s world

  • expanded Vegas and Swingers events, which are a foundation for future updates

  • new Lisa scenes when you visit her when Tracy is falling asleep

  • new Caleb basement renovation plotline

  • redesigned office romance including Tracy sex actions in her office plus Keiko with new scenes

  • 9 completely remodeled and extended endings, now 8 images each

  • and many more…

KEY FEATURES

  • classical story retold with improved visuals, expanded with tons of new elements and reinforced with pleasurable gameplay

  • fun and intuitive relationship simulator mixed with visual novel, non-linear action and plenty of sexual scenes to discover plus 9 completely redesigned and expanded endings

  • inspiring full-HD 4K visuals full of kinky details with over 300 fluid animations and delightful, hand drawn cumshot images

  • rebuild in RENPY with unlimited saves, options to roll back the time, skip already seen scenes and more

  • sex scenes and endings gallery for trophy hunters

LUSTFUL DESIRES

  • indulging in extramarital affairs with other your nanny, hairdresser, publisher and more

  • exploring the world of partner sharing and swinging, including wild orgies

  • pushing boundaries by offering your wife to another woman's embrace

  • optional fantasies involving cuckolding and humiliating power dynamics

  • satisfying carnal desires through threesomes in various tempting configurations
